Notice Of Motion And Motion For Interlocutory Judgment For Partition Sale Of Real Property And Appointment Of Referee
Off Calendar Sep-20-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for Plaintiff's motion for interlocutory judgment for partition sale of real property and appointment of a referee.

Dept. 514; Judge Murlene J. Randle; Clerk: Shanika Monroe; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 11:52:37 a.m. and concluding at 12:06:53 a.m.

Plaintiff requests appointment of referee only.

The following exhibit is MARKED/ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE:

Plaintiff's Exhibit No. 1 - Recorded Grant Deed

MARGUERITA R. MARTINEZ is sworn to testify on behalf of Plaintiff under direct examination.
Plaintiff presents offer of proof.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Marguerita R. Martinez. Plaintiff's Motion for Appointment of Referee is GRANTED.

Plaintiff to submit a word version of proposed order forthwith.
